ensures.text: |RangeSeq(a, b)| == if a > b then 0 else b - a + 1
|RangeSeq(a, b)| == if a > b then 0 else b - a + 1

assertions.text: RangeSeq(2 * k + 1, n) == [2 * k + 1] + RangeSeq(2 * k + 2, n)

ensures.text: Simulate(EvenList(k) + RangeSeq(2 * k + 1, n), k + 1) == EvenList(n / 2)
Simulate(EvenList(k) + RangeSeq(2 * k + 1, n), k + 1) == EvenList(n / 2)
